title: Industrial Heavy Metal Thunder
description: 10+ New metal decorative block palettes for industrial builds.
body:
### The age of wood is over, time of metal has come ! ###   Industrial Heavy Metal Thunder (IHMT) is a chisel-style decoration block mod essentially dedicated to metal blocks, often depreciated in classic deco block mods. **IHMT adds 10 new metal block palettes, 2 naturally generated ore as well as a few functional blocks :**

![Colored Metal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecaf12f13f227b2675c0fae9359890e8b95ec407.png) ![Cast Iron, Smooth Metal, Galvanised Iron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d368c58839b5a41bdc1bc7ec0a8323b510cd670.png) ![Aluminum, Brass, Forged Metal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb1bd2f1b9b9b359873124bbb1d7db7b6a12b62c.png) ![Bronze, Space Metal, Tin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07162a863e370cfafe6d60a73d2849c99eecb388.png) ![Bauxite - Aluminum](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d186323cde52355bfb37560529a47b091524d0dd.png) ![Cassiterite - Tin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c74f629887734bbdf8a42375697af0ec71c9d1e8.png)
